title: Add BCC to Salesforce Email-to-Case for Select SendGrid Templates
description:
Add a BCC recipient to specific SendGrid email templates so that outbound emails are automatically captured in Salesforce via Email-to-Case. The BCC address is a Salesforce email service address and must not be visible to the end user — it is strictly for server-to-server communication.

### Templates to BCC
- Feedback Before More Users
- Pending Shared Delete
- Shared User Deletion

### Excluded Templates
- OTP (one-time password) links should NOT include the BCC.
acceptance_criteria: The three specified SendGrid templates include the Salesforce BCC address
OTP email templates do not include the BCC
The BCC address is not visible in the email headers received by the end user
Emails are successfully captured in Salesforce via Email-to-Case
middleware_changes: Updated SendGrid email dispatch logic to conditionally add a BCC recipient for Feedback Before More Users, Pending Shared Delete, and Shared User Deletion templates.
implementation_notes: The BCC address routes to Salesforce Email-to-Case. Only select templates are BCC'd to avoid OTP emails being logged in Salesforce.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed BCC was added to the three notification templates on staging.
